home.heroSubtitle: The definitive English-language guide to understanding AI tokens, comparing language models, calculating API costs, and navigating the rapidly evolving AI ecosystem — all in one place.
home.tokenHeading: What Exactly Is an AI Token?
home.tokenBody1: Tokens are the fundamental unit of text that AI models read and generate. A token is roughly 4 characters or ¾ of a word in English. Understanding tokens is the key to understanding how AI models work — and how much they cost.
home.topicsHeading: Everything You Need to Navigate AI
home.topicsSubtitle: From absolute beginner to API power user — we cover every angle of the AI tools landscape.
home.topic1Desc: Understand what AI tokens are and how they work.
home.topic2Desc: Compare features, context windows, and pricing side by side.
home.topic3Desc: Estimate token costs across different models and use cases.
home.topic4Desc: Step-by-step guides to get started with AI APIs.
home.topic5Desc: Follow a simple path from complete beginner to confident builder.
home.topic6Desc: Explore real-world use cases and practical examples.
home.topic7Desc: Text, vision, audio, and video model information.
home.topic8Desc: Answers to common questions about tokens, APIs, and costs.
home.apiChooserHeading: How Do You Choose a Mainstream Model API?
home.apiChooserSubtitle: Most people search for ChatGPT API, Gemini API, or Claude API by brand name — but what actually drives the right choice is pricing structure, the right use case fit, and how each model consumes AI tokens differently.
home.apiChooserCta: Not sure which one to look at first? Start with AI Token basics, cost calculation, and model differences — it'll be much easier to judge which API fits your needs.
home.chatgptDesc: Best for general-purpose text tasks, assistant-style applications, and the most widely adopted API entry point for developers and teams new to AI.
home.geminiDesc: Best suited for Google ecosystem integration, multimodal needs, and workflows that require document processing or search-augmented pipelines.
home.claudeDesc: Best for long-context understanding, document processing, and workloads that demand consistently stable, high-quality output at scale.
home.tableHeading: Compare 60+ AI Models Side by Side
home.tableNote: Prices are approximate and subject to change. Always check the official provider pricing page.
home.stepsHeading: Your First AI Token in 3 Steps
home.stepsSubtitle: Never used an AI API before? No problem. Here's the fastest path from zero to your first API call.
home.step1Body: Learn what tokens are, how models read text, and why token limits matter for your applications.
home.step2Body: Compare GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, and more. Find the right balance of capability, speed, and cost for your needs.
home.step3Body: Follow our step-by-step guide to get your API key, write your first prompt, and understand the response.
